roles.name: jobforge-base
roles.description: Shared local read and verification capabilities for JobForge roles.
notes: Keep proxy credentials in files; do not paste them into task prompts.

roles.name: orchestrator
roles.description: Keeps planning, dedupe, and tracker verification inline without browser automation.
notes: Delegate browser-heavy application work to a scoped applicant role.

roles.name: applicant
roles.description: Runs one delegated application attempt with browser and tracker-write permission.
notes: Use at most one job URL per role invocation.
Write outcomes through batch/tracker-additions TSV before merge.

roles.name: verifier
roles.description: Checks merged tracker state and package health after side-effectful work.
